title: phleum phalaris
intro: Phleum phalaris, also known as canary grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Phleum phalaris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Phleum phalaris can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
